#  * https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT.
#  *
#  * AI Disclosure: This file was largely AI-generated by Copilot (Sonnet 4.6).
#  * The AI-generated portions may be considered public domain (CC0-1.0)
#  * and not subject to the project's licence.
#  *
#  * SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT and CC0-1.0
#  ***************************************************************************/

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
project(core_v_mcu_cli_test LANGUAGES C ASM)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 99)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

set(THREADX_ROOT "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../../../libs/threadx")
set(BSP_ROOT "${THREADX_ROOT}/ports/risc-v32/gnu/example_build/core_v_mcu")
set(TX_USER_FILE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tx_user.h")
set(THREADX_ARCH "risc-v32")
set(THREADX_TOOLCHAIN "gnu")

message(STATUS "Toolchain file: ${CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE}")
message(STATUS "C compiler:     ${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}")

add_subdirectory(${THREADX_ROOT} ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/threadx)
target_include_directories(threadx PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/compat_include ${BSP_ROOT}/include)
target_include_directories(freertos-threadx PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/compat_include ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
target_compile_options(freertos-threadx PRIVATE -ffreestanding -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections)

set(BSP_SOURCES
    ${BSP_ROOT}/bsp/irq.c
    ${BSP_ROOT}/bsp/timer_irq.c
    ${BSP_ROOT}/bsp/fll.c
    ${BSP_ROOT}/bsp/gpio.c
    ${BSP_ROOT}/bsp/uart_driver.c
    ${BSP_ROOT}/bsp/system_core_v_mcu.c
    ${BSP_ROOT}/bsp/string.c
)

set(CLI_SOURCES
    libs/cli/source/cli_platform.c
    libs/cli/source/cli_loop.c
    libs/cli/source/cli_stdcmds.c
    libs/cli/source/cli_misc.c
    libs/cli/source/cli_args.c
)

set(APP_SOURCES
    app/main.c
    app/app_commands.c
    libc_shim.c
    ${BSP_ROOT}/crt0.S
    ${BSP_ROOT}/vectors.S
    ${BSP_ROOT}/tx_initialize_low_level.S
)

add_executable(core_v_mcu_cli_test
    ${APP_SOURCES}
    ${BSP_SOURCES}
    ${CLI_SOURCES}
)

set_target_properties(core_v_mcu_cli_test PROPERTIES SUFFIX ".elf")

# Suppress pre-existing warnings in verbatim-copied QuickLogic Apache-2.0 sources.
# We do not modify these files to preserve the upstream diff and copyright audit trail.
# The [-Wmaybe-uninitialized] warnings are false positives: CLI_error() calls longjmp()
# so the variables are always initialised before any use on the reachable path.
set(CLI_UPSTREAM_SOURCES
    libs/cli/source/cli_loop.c
    libs/cli/source/cli_stdcmds.c
    libs/cli/source/cli_misc.c
    libs/cli/source/cli_args.c
)
set_source_files_properties(${CLI_UPSTREAM_SOURCES} PROPERTIES
    COMPILE_OPTIONS "-Wno-unused-parameter;-Wno-maybe-uninitialized;-Wno-sign-compare"
)

target_include_directories(core_v_mcu_cli_test PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/compat_include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/app
    ${BSP_ROOT}/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libs/cli/include
    ${THREADX_ROOT}/utility/rtos_compatibility_layers/FreeRTOS
    ${THREADX_ROOT}/common/inc
    ${THREADX_ROOT}/ports/risc-v32/gnu/inc
)

target_compile_options(core_v_mcu_cli_test PRIVATE
    -ffreestanding
    -ffunction-sections
    -fdata-sections
    -Wall
    -Wextra
)

target_link_libraries(core_v_mcu_cli_test PRIVATE threadx freertos-threadx gcc)

target_link_options(core_v_mcu_cli_test PRIVATE
    -T${BSP_ROOT}/link.ld
    -nostartfiles
    -nostdlib
    -Wl,--gc-sections
    -Wl,-Map=${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/core_v_mcu_cli_test.map
)

add_custom_command(TARGET core_v_mcu_cli_test POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_OBJCOPY} -O binary
        $<TARGET_FILE:core_v_mcu_cli_test>
        ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/core_v_mcu_cli_test.bin
    COMMENT "Generating binary"
)
